title: TD613 Flow-Core Pedagogue Spine and Child-Legible AIA Roadmap
constitutional_invariants: Aperture audits and reconstructs; it does not inherit custody authority.
Flow-Core contextualizes and recommends; it does not command another station.
Dome-World holds the ecology and responsive scenes.
Ash owns custody, ancestry, derivative eligibility, and continuity.
Phason records governed projection change without implying source mutation.
Receipts may cross stations; authority does not.
The human remains the closure point.
Child legibility must not flatten incommensurable heterostratigraphic difference.
AIA routes preserve source, claim, missingness, and local-section invariants.
No route may be selected through hidden learner profiling.
Animation is state-driven and reduced-motion complete.
Beauty remains evidence of constraint, never evidence of authority.
No new serverless function is authorized by this roadmap.

canonical_information_dome_scenes.purpose: Expose local coherence and non-coercive incompatibility.
canonical_information_dome_scenes.required_non_claim: Mismatch does not establish falsehood, bad faith, identity, intent, or required suppression.

canonical_information_dome_scenes.purpose: Expose source invariance under changed projection or acceptance window.
canonical_information_dome_scenes.required_non_claim: Projection change does not establish content mutation, identity change, falsehood, or publication authority.

canonical_information_dome_scenes.purpose: Expose relation-dependent topology absent from baseline and singletons.
canonical_information_dome_scenes.required_non_claim: Pair residue does not establish intent, identity, authorship, causation, prediction, suppression, recommendation, or automatic Ash action.

phases.name: Baseline Freeze and Implementation Concordance
phases.exit_gate: Every proposed scene input is traceable to implementation, fixture, exact package, or declared hypothesis.

phases.name: Pure Pedagogue Kernel
phases.exit_gate: Pure tests pass without DOM, network, timer, persistence, or station mutation.

phases.name: AIA View Compiler
phases.exit_gate: All views preserve source, claim, missingness, contradiction, local-section attribution, exit, and station authority.

phases.name: Flow-Core Visual and Animated Grammar
phases.exit_gate: All five channels agree on one transition; hidden views do zero work; reduced-motion is complete.

phases.name: Information Dome Canonical Scenes
phases.exit_gate: All scenes complete the pedagogue cycle, support every AIA view, preserve tomography, and pass mobile/reduced-motion tests.

phases.name: Route-Burden Observatory
phases.exit_gate: The instrument identifies design bottlenecks without issuing user diagnoses or automatic redesign commands.

phases.name: Ash Custody Root Pedagogue Route
phases.exit_gate: A first-time operator can state what stayed local, what Ash created, what changed, what remains unauthorized, and what may happen next.

phases.name: Cross-Station Propagation
phases.exit_gate: Every scene preserves station ownership and non-sovereign adapter posture.

phases.name: Physical Flow-Core Scene
phases.exit_gate: Participants can distinguish stored potential, delivered work, loss, reserve, optional surplus, heat, and work.

phases.name: Empirical Validation
phases.exit_gate: The full scene improves causal understanding and recovery without increasing false certainty or hiding missingness.

phases.name: Production Promotion
phases.exit_gate: Production status is earned through direct observation; merge alone does not promote the program.

hard_non_claims: interaction does not prove developmental rank
animation does not imply truth or authority
pair residue does not imply identity or intent
projection change does not imply content mutation
case binding does not imply truth
rebuild eligibility does not imply release authority
rejected_implementations: single simplified view that removes missingness
decorative randomness presented as field evidence
motion as sole carrier of meaning
closing_invariant: Let the learner challenge the structure.
Only the human closes the seam.
